---
title: "The village school, or, A collection of entertaining histories for the instruction and amusement of all good children"
---

## The village school, or, A collection of entertaining histories for the instruction and amusement of all good children

**Author:** Dorothy Kilner
**Date:** <i>c</i>.1795
**Imprint:** London: Marshall

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
